rawIntent:
[Feature: Build the leave management module â€” Phase 2: Create LeavePolicy model and repository]

Create src/modules/policy/policy.model.ts with TypeScript interfaces for LeavePolicy (attributes: id, leaveTypeId, maxDaysPerYear, maxConsecutiveDays, requiresApproval, allowNegativeBalance, blackoutDates, status) and CreateLeavePolicyDto. Import LeaveType from src/shared/types/index.ts which already exists. Create src/modules/policy/policy.repository.ts with IPolicyRepository interface and PolicyRepository class. Include Jest unit tests in tests/unit/modules/policy/policy.repository.test.ts. This phase has no dependencies on other application modules.

Phase architecture notes:
LeavePolicy defines rules and constraints for a specific leave type.

Detailed phase architecture (architecture-agent):
